title: 10 best herbal essential oils for dry nose
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, essential oils helps with dry nose because of its decongestant properties. The oil's active compounds, linalool and linalyl acetate, help to reduce inflammation and congestion in the nasal passages. By promoting relaxation and reducing stress, Lavandula angustifolia essential oil also helps to calm the body's natural response to irritation, providing relief from dryness and discomfort.
